stem: Tools ___ back millions of years have been found near the excavation site.
explanation: 考点:现在分词作定语。tools 与 date 是主动关系（工具“可追溯”），用现在分词 dating 后置修饰。

stem: The fossil remains ___ in the limestone cave have altered our view of human origins.
explanation: 考点:过去分词作定语。remains 与 unearth 是被动关系（被发掘的遗骸），用过去分词 unearthed。

stem: The site ___ to the Pleistocene period by geological evidence.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。site 是被测定的对象，强调至今已完成的结果，用 has been dated。

stem: ___ under layers of rock, the skull was preserved for ages.
explanation: 考点:过去分词作状语。skull 与 bury 是被动关系（被埋藏），句首状语用过去分词 Buried。

stem: Valuable fossils are still being ___ (unearth) in East Africa.
explanation: 考点:现在进行时被动。fossils 是被发掘的对象，are being unearthed 表正在进行的被动动作。

stem: Spiders ___ live in our gardens destroy thousands of harmful insects each year.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 spiders 指物且在从句中作主语，用 which/that；who 只指人。

stem: Scientists study spider silk ___ new materials for medicine and industry.
explanation: 考点:不定式作目的状语。“研究蜘蛛丝”的目的是“开发新材料”，用 to develop 表目的。

stem: The web, ___ looks fragile, is in fact remarkably strong.
explanation: 考点:非限制性定语从句。逗号后的补充说明从句不能用 that，先行词 web 指物用 which。

stem: We should spare spiders in order ___ the ecological balance.
explanation: 考点:不定式。in order to do 表目的，“为了保护生态平衡”，用 to protect。

stem: Insects that ___ (damage) crops would multiply if spiders were removed.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。insects 是先行词，从句缺谓语，一般现在时表普遍事实，填 damage。

stem: Down the precipice ___ the four climbers when the rope snapped.
explanation: 考点:倒装。地点状语 Down the precipice 置句首，主谓倒装，谓语用一般过去时 plunged。

stem: Only after the tragedy ___ climbers pay more attention to rope safety.
explanation: 考点:部分倒装。Only after ... 置句首，主句用 did + 主语 + 动词原形，故选 did。

stem: The party ___ the summit when the accident occurred during the descent.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。“到达顶峰”发生在“事故发生”之前，是过去的过去，用 had reached。

stem: Fierce ___ the north face may be, it still attracts climbers from around the world.
explanation: 考点:as 引导的让步倒装。形容词 fierce 提前，用 Fierce as ... may be，意为“尽管……险峻”。

stem: Whymper realized that the cord ___ (already/show) signs of wear before it broke.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。“出现磨损”发生在 broke 之前，填 had already shown。

stem: Vera Petrova, ___ was born blind, can identify objects by touch alone.
explanation: 考点:非限制性定语从句。逗号后补充说明，先行词指人且作主语，用 who，不能用 that。

stem: Scientists were struck by the fact ___ she could perceive colours by touch.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句解释 the fact 的内容，that 在从句中不作成分，不能换 which。

stem: The tests, ___ lasted several weeks, confirmed her remarkable ability.
explanation: 考点:非限制性定语从句。逗号隔开，先行词 tests 指物，用 which，不可用 that。

stem: The belief ___ the brain can compensate for lost senses is now widely accepted.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句说明 the belief 的具体内容，从句成分完整，用 that。

stem: Her case, which ___ (study) for decades, reveals the potential of the human mind.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。for decades 表持续至今，case 是被研究的对象，填 has been studied。

stem: Teenagers resent ___ like children by their parents.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词(动名词)。resent 后接 doing，且“被对待”是被动，用 being treated。

stem: It is essential that parents ___ to their adolescent children.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。It is essential that + (should) + 动词原形，表建议或要求，填 listen。

stem: The author suggests that both sides ___ more tolerant of each other.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。suggest 表“建议”时，that 从句用 (should) + 动词原形，填 be。

stem: Young people should try ___ rather than merely criticise their elders.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词(不定式)。try to do 表示“努力/试图做某事”，try doing 表“试着做看效果”，此处用 to understand。

stem: Many adolescents resent ___ (judge) by outdated standards.
explanation: 考点:非谓语动词(动名词)。resent 后接 doing，“被评判”是被动，填 being judged。

stem: Fierce ___ the rivalry may be, true sportsmanship should never be abandoned.
explanation: 考点:as 让步倒装。形容词 fierce 提前，Fierce as ... may be 意为“尽管竞争可能激烈”。

stem: Only by returning to fair play ___ sport regain its virtue.
explanation: 考点:部分倒装。Only by doing ... 置句首，主句助动词提前，用 can sport regain。

stem: If sport ___ truly about friendship, nationalism would play no part.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气。对现在的不真实假设，if 从句 be 动词用 were，主句用 would do。

stem: If athletes ___ less driven by money, fewer would have taken dope.
explanation: 考点:虚拟语气(对过去)。主句 would have done 表明是对过去的假设，if 从句用 had been。

stem: Never before ___ (sport/incite) such fierce nationalism as it does today.
explanation: 考点:倒装。Never before 置句首，主句部分倒装；for 与 today 提示现在完成时，填 has sport incited。

stem: High-pitched cries ___ by bats and bounce back from obstacles in the dark.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时被动。cries 是被发出的对象，陈述客观事实，用 are emitted。

stem: Scientists accept the fact ___ bats navigate by echolocation.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句解释 the fact 的内容，that 在从句中不作成分。

stem: Many bat species ___ to the edge of extinction by habitat destruction.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。species 是被推向灭绝的对象，强调至今的结果，用 have been driven。

stem: There is evidence ___ bats play a vital role in controlling insect populations.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句说明 evidence 的具体内容，从句成分完整，用 that。

stem: Ultrasonic cries, which ___ (be) beyond human hearing, are used for navigation.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。which 引导非限制性定语从句，cries 是复数主语，陈述事实填 are。

stem: New safety regulations ___ by the department in recent years.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。regulations 是被出台的对象，in recent years 用 have been introduced。

stem: Officers inspect shops ___ sell food to the public.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 shops 指物且在从句中作主语，用 which/that。

stem: Repeat offenders may ___ in court if they ignore warnings.
explanation: 考点:情态动词被动。offenders 是被起诉的对象，may be prosecuted 表“可能被起诉”。

stem: Goods that ___ to meet the required standards must be withdrawn.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 goods 是复数，从句谓语用原形 fail；fail to do 表“未能……”。

stem: A formal complaint ___ (lodge) by the customer led to an investigation.
explanation: 考点:过去分词/被动。complaint 是被提出的，可用过去分词 lodged 作后置定语，或 was lodged 作定语从句省略。

stem: Agents ___ infiltrated enemy circles brought back valuable intelligence.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 agents 指人且在从句中作主语，用 who。

stem: The Queen ___ already been warned before the plot was carried out.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。“得到警告”发生在 was carried out 之前，用 had already been warned。

stem: Letters ___ the conspirators had exchanged were intercepted in time.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 letters 指物，在从句中作 exchanged 的宾语，用 that/which。

stem: Agents discovered that the messages ___ in code.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。“用密码写成”发生在 discovered 之前，messages 是受动者，用 had been written。

stem: Several conspirators ___ (plot) for months before they were arrested.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时/过去完成进行时。“密谋”发生在 were arrested 之前，填 had been plotting 或 had plotted。

stem: There is a belief ___ anyone with a good idea can succeed in the Valley.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句解释 the belief 的内容，that 在从句中不作成分。

stem: Companies ___ began in garages have grown into global giants.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 companies 指物且在从句中作主语，用 which/that。

stem: The fact ___ so many giants started in garages inspires new entrepreneurs.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句说明 the fact 的具体内容，不可换 which。

stem: Silicon Valley, ___ stretches south of San Francisco, is the centre of innovation.
explanation: 考点:非限制性定语从句。逗号隔开，先行词指地名，用 which，不能用 that。

stem: The culture of the Valley encourages entrepreneurs ___ (iterate) rapidly on their products.
explanation: 考点:不定式。encourage sb. to do 鼓励某人做某事，填 to iterate。

stem: ___ old gracefully means keeping your interests broad and your mind active.
explanation: 考点:动名词作主语。“优雅地老去”作主语，用动名词 Growing。

stem: The elderly should avoid ___ on regrets and resenting the young.
explanation: 考点:动名词。avoid 后接 doing；and 连接 resenting，前面也用 dwelling 保持平行。

stem: I wish more elderly people ___ socially active.
explanation: 考点:wish 虚拟语气。wish 后对现在的愿望，从句用 would/could + 动词原形，填 would remain。

stem: If only he ___ from social life so early.
explanation: 考点:If only 虚拟语气。对过去的遗憾，用 If only + had done，填 had not withdrawn。

stem: Russell advises the elderly to avoid ___ (resent) the freedom of youth.
explanation: 考点:动名词。avoid 后接 doing，填 resenting。

stem: The financial sector ___ banks, insurers and investment firms.
explanation: 考点:comprise。主语是整体 the financial sector，宾语是部分，用 comprises；comprise 不用被动。

stem: A typical bank ___ several departments serving different customers.
explanation: 考点:comprise。主语 bank 是整体，宾语 departments 是部分，主动语态 comprises；不说 is comprised of（英式规范）。

stem: Too much trust ___ in institutions that depositors barely understand.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时被动。trust 是被寄予的对象，陈述普遍现象，用 is placed。

stem: Savings ___ over many years may be lost irrevocably if a bank fails.
explanation: 考点:过去分词作定语。savings 与 accumulate 是被动关系（被积累的储蓄），用 accumulated。

stem: The banking system ___ (comprise) many different types of institution.
explanation: 考点:comprise。主语 system 是整体，宾语 types 是部分，一般现在时填 comprises；comprise 不用被动。
